characters.name: Hakuoro
characters.description:
Hakuoro wears an irremovable mask over the top part of his head extended down to just under the eyes. He is found badly injured by [url=/c412]Eruruu[/url], [url=/c413]Aruruu[/url], and their grandmother [url=/c8381]Tuskur[/url] in a nearby forest and they nurse him back to health. It is soon apparent that he has lost all of his memories, and he additionally finds that the state of the world varies significantly from his expectations. In place of his forgotten name, he is given the name Hakuoro. [spoiler](白皇, meaning "White Emperor" in Ainu; this was also the name of Eruruu and Aruruu's father.)[/spoiler] His main weapon of choice is a large metal fan given to him by Tuskur. He quickly captivates and gains the trust of those around him, and soon finds himself in a growing position of leadership.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Eruruu
characters.description:
Eruruu is the first person [url=/c411]Hakuoro[/url] sees when he wakes up after being found by her and her family. She nurses Hakuoro back to health until he regains his strength. Eruruu has a forceful, but caring, personality. She is named after a fictional flower and has dog-like ears and a tail.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

[spoiler]She is the descendant of [url=/c8410]Mikoto[/url]. Eruruu kisses Hakuoro before he is sealed as he tells her that they will meet again and that she will be waiting for him. At the end of the story, she continues as a healer and is awaiting Hakuoro's return. In the last scene she turns around and sees someone or something not shown to the reader. It is commonly theorized to be Hakuoro without Uitsualnemetia's mask.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Aruruu
characters.description:
Aruruu is [url=/c412]Eruruu's[/url] shy, quiet younger sister, and a friend to [url=/c415]Yuzuha[/url] and [url=/c414]Camyu[/url]. Like Eruruu, she is also named after a fictional flower. It is said that the Eruruu and Aruruu flowers only grow together. When she first meets [url=/c411]Hakuoro[/url] she is shy, running and hiding from Hakuoro at every opportunity and speaking very little. After Hakuoro eventually wins over Aruruu's affections, she calls Hakuoro "father".

[Based on  [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

[spoiler]Aruruu raises Mutikapa's baby tiger, naming it [url=/c8413]Mukkuru[/url]. After it grows (in an astoundingly short period of time), she begins to ride him into battle, often in spite of orders or warnings to stay away from danger[/spoiler].

[spoiler]It is later revealed that Aruruu had been severely injured presumably from an earthquake prior to meeting Hakuoro. Uitsualnemetia healed her in exchange for Eruruu's body and soul. She is also heavily wounded and presumably killed by an attack from Hauenkua, but is revived by Hakuoro in his aspect as Uitsualnemetia[/spoiler].

characters.name: Camyu
characters.description:
The second princess of Onkamiyamukai and younger sister of [url=/c8395]Ulthury[/url]. She befriends [url=/c413]Aruruu[/url] and [url=/c413]Yuzuha[/url] and is often seen playing with them. Previously, she had no friends (apart from her sister) and everyone in the mediators considered her to be a monster because she was born with black wings.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]Her black wings are a sign that she has inherited Mutsumi, who lives within her like a split personality.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Yuzuha
characters.description:
Yuzuha is [url=/c8384]Oboro[/url]'s little sister and friend to [url=/c413]Aruruu[/url] and [url=/c414]Camyu[/url]. She has been very sick with an unknown illness all her life, and is blind. Although bedridden most of the time, her senses of smell and hearing have been whetted by her lack of sight, enabling her to recognize a person by their scent or even the manner of their footsteps. 

Yuzuha also possesses a gentle persona, which she made especially apparent when dealing with her older brother, and in the fact that she refuses to let an animal die in the hope of obtaining a cure for her condition.

[spoiler]In the epilogue to [url=/v3]Utawarerumono: Prelude to the Fallen[/url], Yuzuha is presumed to have passed away, but not before bearing a healthy child. The child's inherited illness is kept in remission, at least for the moment, by virtue of [url=/c411]Hakuoro[/url]'s divine blood. Her brother treasures the child so much in the place of his late sister that he embarks on a journey to show the child the world.[/spoiler]

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Mutsumi
characters.description:
Mutsumi is Witsarunemitea's "daughter" and the one who sealed him. She now lives on inside Kamyu like a split personality inherited through blood lines.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Uitsualnemetia
characters.description:
The Onkami (Great God). Also the name of the religion of many countries.
[Based on In-game Encyclopedia]
[spoiler]The result of a pact between a powerful, ancient, and mysterious entity that was discovered as a fossil in the modern day and a young and fatally curious archaeologist. Uitsualnemetia asked Mutsumi to destroy him when he could not stop killing the scientists at the research facility. Mutsumi failed to destroy him, so she sealed him in the Earth instead. However, he was split into two halves (a "good" half and an "evil" half) before he was sealed. The "good" half became Hakuoro and the "evil" half possessed Dii.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Tuskur
characters.description:
Tusukuru is [url=/c412]Eruruu's[/url] and [url=/c413]Aruruu's[/url] grandmother and village elder, the leader of the village. She is a very kind person and is respected by everyone in the village and even some out of it.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

[spoiler]She is fatally stabbed while protecting Aruruu from an attack by one of [url=/c8390]Nuwangi's[/url] soldiers, although Nuwangi did not order the attack and even gets angry at the soldier afterwards. After Kenashikourupe falls, [url=/c411]Hakuoro[/url] renames the country Tuskur in her honor.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Teoro
characters.description:
Teoro is a villager who quickly becomes friends with Hakuoro (who he refers to as 'An-chan'). His weapon is an axe. His wife is a bossy blonde woman named Sopoku (ソポク), who is always scolding him for skipping out on his work or being drunk. 
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]He returns to his home after Kenashikourupe falls, which becomes his downfall when Kuccha Keccha invades. Although fatally wounded, he makes the journey to warn Hakuoro, and while warning Hakuoro of the oncoming invasion, he is so successful in hiding his condition under false cheer that Hakuoro and his court do not even learn that he is injured until they discover his dead body.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Sopoku
characters.description:
Teoro's wife. Spirited, despite her appearance. Saw Eruruu and Aruruu as her precious little sisters. Scolds Teoro for skipping out on work or being drunk.
[From in-game encyclopedia]

characters.name: Oboro
characters.description:
Oboro was in the beginning an impulsive and somewhat egotistical bandit chief of a village near the one which Hakuoro dwells in. Overpowering these traits, however, is his care for his younger sister, Yuzuha, to whom he would bring Tuskur to oversee her health. Oboro's main weapons of choice are two long, light swords, which he uses to execute swift fighting techniques.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]When Hakuoro becomes the leader of the country's rebellion, Oboro joins forces with Hakuoro and swears eternal allegiance, with revenge for Tuskur among his reasons, calling Hakuoro his brother.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Dorry
characters.description:
Dorry and [url=/c8386]Guraa[/url] are twin archers serving under Oboro. There are several ways to tell them apart: Dorry has purple eyes while Guraa's are blue, and the bottom part of their matching garments is blue on Dorry and red on Guraa.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]Their gender is difficult to ascertain, even by other characters. In the game, Oboro and the twins themselves state that they are male.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Guraa
characters.description:
[url=/c8385]Dorry[/url] and Guraa are twin archers serving under Oboro. There are several ways to tell them apart: Dorry has purple eyes while Guraa's are blue, and the bottom part of their matching garments is blue on Dorry and red on Guraa.
[From  [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]Their gender is difficult to ascertain, even by other characters. In the game, Oboro and the twins themselves state that they are male.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Benawi
characters.description:
Benawi is a mononofu (warrior) of Kenashikourupe. He has a strong sense of responsibility to his country and carries a calm and logical personality. Benawi's main weapon of choice is a polearm much like a voulge, which he uses most effectively while riding.
[Based on [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]When Hakuoro's rebellion overtakes Kenashikourupe, Benawi realizes defeat and kills the emperor, Inkara to spare him from possible torture and humiliation. Benawi then attempts suicide, but Hakuoro stops him, convincing Benawi to join him. [/spoiler]

characters.name: Kurou
characters.description:
He is the fiercely loyal second-in-command of Benawi's cavalry men, and the former samurai leader over the country of Kenashikourupe, though neither he nor Benawi seem to care for the emperor so much as they do for the empire. Even without his steed or any weapons, he is shown to be capable of defeating a small army with his bare hands, alone.
[From  [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]When the emperor falls, he remains loyal to Benawi, and, in turn, to Hakuoro, to whom Benawi swears allegiance.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Chikinaro
characters.description:
Chikinaro is a somewhat shady merchant with a habit of mysteriously appearing when called. He procured [url=/c8396]Karulau's[/url] unique sword, as well as [url=/c413]Aruruu's[/url] pet Gachatara.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters#Chikinaro]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]He makes his first appearance as a spy paid by Benawi to infiltrate the rebellion's headquarters. He later assists Hakuoro in obtaining the ingredients needed to make the explosives used to repel Shikeripechim's initial attack.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Nuwangi
characters.description:
Nuwangi was a childhood friend of [url=/c412]Eruruu[/url], and used to be reserved and docile. He was later brought to the capital of Kenashikourupe by his [url=/c8391]father[/url], where he gradually became spoiled by the luxuries. Now older, he is exceedingly arrogant, abusing the power of his higher rank. He is also cowardly.

[Based on [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

[spoiler]After learning his father was the reason his mother died, Nuwangi kills him in an act of madness. He is later promoted to Samurai General by his [url=/c8392]uncle[/url], but is then captured by the rebels. To his surprise, he is freed by Eruruu, effectively allowing him to leave without harm. Nuwangi seems to be devastated by this, in which he vanishes off into the mist, never to be seen again. As he begins to reconsider his life and vows to atone for his deeds, he is killed by bandits hoping to profit from his death[/spoiler].

characters.name: Sasante
characters.description:
Brother of Kenashikourupe's emperor. Ruled the area containing Eruruu's village. Very sly and cruel.
[From In-game Encyclopedia]
[spoiler]After he levied harsh taxes, a rebellion broke out. In the end he is betrayed and killed by his son Nuwangi.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Inkalla
characters.description:
The owlo of Kenashikourupe, and Nuwangi's uncle (Sasante's elder brother).
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Munto
characters.description:
An Onkamiyamukai High Priest accompanying Urutorii and Kamyu. He constantly encounters trouble while looking after them.
[From In-game Encyclopedia]

characters.name: Waabe
characters.description:
Onkamiyamukai emperor and Oruyankuru (Grand High Priest). Father of Urutorii and Kamyu.
[From In-game Encyclopedia and [url=http://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%81%86%E3%81%9F%E3%82%8F%E3%82%8C%E3%82%8B%E3%82%82%E3%81%AE#.E3.82.AA.E3.83.B3.E3.82.AB.E3.83.9F.E3.83.A4.E3.83.A0.E3.82.AB.E3.82.A4]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Ulthury
characters.description:
Ulthury is the first princess of Onkamiyamukai. She decides to become the yomoru (priest sent to look out for a country's welfare) of Tuskur. She quickly gains great respect and admiration for [url=/c411]Hakuoro[/url], after seeing how kind and wise he is.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Karulau
characters.description:
A Giryagina swordswoman found by [url=/c411]Hakuoro[/url]'s men after the slave ship she was on sank. She is later hired by Hakuoro. She is a first class fighter with superhuman strength and a large custom sword, but also a free spirit who loves sake and elegance.

[Based on in-game encyclopedia]

[spoiler]Derihourai is her younger brother.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Touka
characters.description:
Touka is an Evenkuruga mononofu (warrior) who serves under Lord Orikakan. She fights using a slim sword of an unspecified variety which she combines with her astonishing agility to execute swift and deadly attacks.
The Evenkuruga are blessed with such extraordinary fighting abilities that many have carved their names in history; they are a deeply moralistic people and side with good and fight evil in the name of justice and honor.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]After Hakuoro convinces her not to commit seppuku she pledges fealty to serve as his bodyguard. She obsessively follows this oath, true to her clan's nature.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Niwe
characters.description:
Niwe is emperor of Shikerpechim, a country of vast strength that was three times bigger than Tusukuru, and had ten times the military power. Niwe initiates numerous and lengthy attacks against Tusukuru.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]His attacks against Tusukuru are an attempt to draw out Hakuoro's inner beast. It is later revealed that he was working with Dii, from whom he learned Hakuoro's true identity. In their final confrontation, Niwe finally succeeds in drawing out the demigod slumbering within Hakuoro. His amazement is cut short however, as the raging beast tears Niwe to pieces, signaling the downfall of Shikerpecim.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Kuuya Amrulineulka
characters.name_original: アムルリネウルカ・クーヤ
characters.description:
Kuuya is the young ruler of Kunnekamun. She eventually befriends Hakuoro after having many secret meetings with him at night. Hakuoro was under the impression that Kuuya was male until she removed her veil.
[Based on  [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]She pilots a silver Abh-Kamu, although she is not used to war (which later wreaks havoc on her mind). Kuuya cares for the welfare of her people, but doesn't know what decision to make. This proves to be her downfall and ultimately leads to a global war. Later she suffers a psychotic break after witnessing Genjimaru's death and Hakuoro's true form, and reverts to the mentality of a young child.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Sakuya
characters.description:
Sakuya is one of Kuuya's attendants and Genjimaru's granddaughter.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

[spoiler]When she and Genjimaru escape Kunnekamun, her tendons in her legs are cut to prove her loyalty to Hakuoro. After Kuuya suffers from her psychotic break, Sakuya becomes her caretaker.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Genjimaru
characters.description:
Genjimaru is an old, but extremely powerful Evenkuruga mononofu serving under Kuuya. He is also Hien and Sakuya's grandfather. His main weapon of choice is a long sword.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]He was instrumental in helping the other nations defeat the Abh-Kamu, by revealing their weakness. He would later be killed by Dii as "payment" in canceling Kuuya's contract.[/spoiler]

[spoiler]In Mask of Truth, we learn that he was an acquaintance of Jachdwalt, whose swordsmanship skills came from his observation of Genjimaru's style. He gifted his sword to Jachdwalt before his departure.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Hauenkua
characters.description:
Hauenkua serves under Amururineuruka Kuuya and has roughly the same status as Hien. He is entertained by war and suffering and has a somewhat psychopathic personality, however this all drains away when he feels his mortality, leaving him a panicked wreck.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]He pilots a red Avu-Kamuu, with claws on each arm. It is also revealed that he has been working with Dii. During the final battle, he suffers a psychotic break and is killed by Hien. [/spoiler]

characters.name: Hien
characters.description:
Hien is Sakuya's brother, and Genjimaru's grandson. He is often the level headed one between him and Hauenkua.
[From  [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]He pilots a blue Avu-Kamuu armed with a massive blade.  He also advocated that the Emperor/Empress should unite the nations through peace. In the game, he advocates starting global war and destroying all enemy villagers just like Hauenkua, except unlike Hauenkua, he believes that he is doing it for a good cause. When Dii reveals himself, Hien willingly joined him. During his final encounter with Hakuoro's forces, he kills Hauenkua mid battle. Once he is defeated by Hakuoro and his allies, Hien assists them by leading them to Dii's location, but is killed by Mutsumi [/spoiler]

characters.name: Orikakan
characters.description:
Orikakan is the lord of Kucca Kecca, a small country renowned for the skill and zeal of its cavalry, and is an excellent tactician.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]Orikakan is obsessed with gaining revenge against Hakuoro, believing him to be Rakushain, a traitor to Kuccha Keccha, who murdered his wife, children, and hundreds of other people. The murdered wife was Orikakan's sister, whose death is the primary reason for his zeal in pursuing revenge. He seeks to attain his revenge by attacking Tusukuru. He personally leads the attack on Yamayura, slaying all the inhabitants and prompting Hakuoro to declare war on Kuccha Keccha. While initially Hakuoro believes he might indeed be Rakushain (since Hakuoro lost all of his memories and cannot remember who he was, traitor or not, before Eruruu found him injured in the woods), Orikakan turns out to be mistaken, manipulated by another agency into falsely believing that Hakuoro was Rakushain. He was eventually killed by Niwe when his purpose was fulfilled, before Hakuoro is able to hear all he has to say.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Derihourai
characters.description:
Derihourai is Karura's younger brother. He leads the rebellion against the country of Na Tunk. Derihourai's main weapon of choice is the tonfa.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]He later becomes the lord of the newly created country, Karurauaturei, which is named after Karura. [/spoiler]

characters.name: Suonkasu
characters.description:
Suonkasu is the emperor of Na Tunk. He is somewhat insane and extremely sadistic, with an entire garden of flowers grown on the bodies of live humans. He is apparently infatuated with Karura.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]He is killed by Derihourai during the rebellion.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Ponahoi
characters.description:
Originally a fisherman, but was made the emperor of Erumui by Kanhorudari. He is weak willed and cannot go against Kanhorudari. Effectively a "puppet", he is forced by Kanhorudari to invade Kunnekamun, but is easily defeated.
[From In-game Encyclopedia]

characters.name: Kanhordari
characters.description:
Kanhordari is the despotic emperor of Noseshechika, one of the three great countries alongside Onkamiyamukai and Kunnekamun. He is large and physically dominating.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]He seems to hold a grudge against Kunnekamun and finally attempts to conquer them, although this attempt backfires horribly when Kunnekamun counterattacks with the Abh-Kamu, conquering Noseshechika and killing Kanhordari.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Dii
characters.description:
Dii was an Onkamiyamukai scholar who had gone missing.
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]He wandered inside the cave where [url=/c417]Uitsualnemetia's[/url] soul was sealed. Just as Hakuoro is Uitsualnemetia's 'good' side, Dii is now possessed by Uitsualnemetia's darker side. He instigates and catalyzes wars far and wide so that Uitsualnemetia's "children"—all Proxies were based on analysis of Uitsualnemetia's avatar Iceman—may, via natural selection, reach greater heights. Dii, unlike Hakuoro, has complete conscious control of his abilities and is able to dispense with the powerful Genjimaru without visible effort. At the conclusion of his final battle with Hakuoro, Dii's mortal form is destroyed, and the dark half of Uitsualnemetia's soul that dwelled within him is reunited with Hakuoro.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Mikoto
characters.description:
Mikoto is an artificially created human based on Iceman's body. Iceman names her based on her identification number 3510. The word Mikoto can also be written as 命, which can also be pronounced as 'inochi', meaning 'life'.

[Based on [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters#Mikoto]Wikipedia[/url]]

She was given a master key to the research facility by Mizushima so that she and Iceman could escape. She gave birth to Iceman's child, but was recaptured and butchered by scientists for research. The master key was passed down through her descendants and eventually became [url=/c412]Eruruu's[/url] hair ornament.

characters.name: Mizushima
characters.description:
Mizushima is a researcher (appearing only via holograms) responsible for working with Iceman. 
[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Utawarerumono_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]
[spoiler]Although he maintains a professional relationship with Iceman, upon learning that the research team plans to permanently refreeze Iceman, he betrays his fellow humans and helps Iceman escape to the surface, giving him the master key which would later become Eruruu's hair ornament. It is implied that he was eventually found out by the humans, although his fate is unknown.[/spoiler]

characters.name: Mutikapa
characters.description:
A large black and white tiger. The Forest God's servant and Lord of the Forest. [spoiler]Goes on a rampage, killing villagers indiscriminantly at night after Nuwangi destroys the shrine in the forest. Mutikapa's fur is harder than iron, but gets soft when wet. Hakuoro and the others use this weakness to kill Mutikapa and end the rampage.[/spoiler]
[Based on in-game encyclopedia]

characters.name: Mukkuru
characters.description:
The baby of Mutikapa from Kakaerayura Forest. He considers Aruruu, who raised him, to be his mother. Despite being large and fierce in battle, is really a big softie.
[From in-game encyclopedia]

characters.name: Fumirul
characters.description:
A gentle lady of Tuskur, known for her grace and patience. Always by [url=/c37789]Kuon’s[/url] side, she acts like an understanding older sister to her. Her stunning beauty tends to leave chaos in her wake, which leads to trouble for Kuon.

[From [url=http://atlus.com/uta/truth/home.html]official site[/url]]

characters.name: Kamuchataal
characters.description:
Kamuchataal is the daughter of the owlo Inkalla, making her the niece of Inkalla's younger brother Sasante, and the cousin of Sasante's son Nuwangi. She is a long-time acquaintance of Benawi and Kurou because they served her father, and has a one-sided crush on Kurou.

[From [url=https://utawarerumono.fandom.com/wiki/Kamuchataal]Utawarerumono Wiki[/url]]
